---
title: Air Navigation Service Provider (ANSP) View
---
<style type="text/css">
    
    .resp-container {
        position: relative;
        width: 110%;
        overflow: hidden;
        padding-top: 155.0%;
        

        
    }
    
    .resp-iframe {
        position: absolute;
        top: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        height: 105%;
        border: 0;
    }
</style>
 

 
<div class="resp-container"><iframe class="resp-iframe"  src="https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiNDg4ZjdiMzctMDY2ZC00OTVmLTg5ZDItOGMwN2VhMjFiNTlmIiwidCI6Ijc2ZjMzYzIwLTU5NzktNDQwOC1hZGY3LThiM2M0YmU5NWU1MiIsImMiOjl9" frameborder="0" style="border:0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</div>
